content:

# Batch Processing. Optimizes large-scale task execution through agent swarms, API batch processing, and intelligent loops to maximize efficiency and reduce costs. ### Related Skills. Manages Discord operations including messaging, reactions, and channel management directly through Claude. Automates code formatting and linting checks to ensure code quality and CI compliance before committing. Discover MCP servers that connect MCP clients like Claude and Cursor to your favorite tools. Browse the MCP Market to get started. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. Sync skills to **Claude Cowork**, **Claude Code**, **Codex**, and more.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing - Claude API Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

We use cookies to deliver and improve our services, analyze site usage, and if you agree, to customize or personalize your experience and market our services to you. # Batch processing. Batch processing is a powerful approach for handling large volumes of requests efficiently. Instead of processing requests one at a time with immediate responses, batch processing allows you to submit multiple requests together for asynchronous processing. The Message Batches API is Anthropic's first implementation of this pattern. # Message Batches API. The Message Batches API is a powerful, cost-effective way to asynchronously process large volumes of Messages requests. ## How the Message Batches API works. When you send a request to the Message Batches API:. Almost any request you can make to the Messages API can be included in a batch. Since each request in the batch is processed independently, you can mix different types of requests within a single batch. A Message Batch is composed of a list of requests to create a Message.
